MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Vernon Bradley for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant's Counsel Vernon Bradley is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Responses, Set One, Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Mark Bluer's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants Sandy Mauvais' and Michael Obergfoll's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Continued To Mar-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Demurrer; Demurrer And Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MICHAEL PISIAS JR, 433-3993, APPEARING VIA COURT CALL FOR CROSS DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY
VERNON BRADLEY, 331-4441, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY

ARGUED AND The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S Demurrer TO CROSS COMPLAINT OF SANDY MAUVAIS is OVERRULED WITH TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. CROSS-DEFENDANT OWED A DUTY OF FAITH AND FAIR DEALING WHICH CROSS-COMPLAINANT ALLEGES CROSS DEFENDANT VIOLATED BY ITS CONDUCT IN PAYING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITHOUT INVESTIGATING. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
